title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Money Seeds S.R.L. (2,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on Money Seeds S.R.L. The controller failed to fulfil a data subject's request to exercise their rights. Legal basis: Art. 12 GDPR, Art. 13 GDPR, Art. 14 GDPR.
dedupKey: romania enforcement action against money seeds s r l 2 000|2026-01-08
